title: CliParserError message should be included in str(error)
body:
CliParserError in radicli/util.py inherits from SystemExit and stores message in self.message, but str(error) returns the exit code (1), not the message string. This makes it hard to assert on error messages in tests.



Fix: override __str__ in CliParserError to return self.message.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py.
